logs.name: tart-knot
logs.text:
Bullshit.

War is one of the simplest things about humans.

It's as simple as sex and food and just as primal and just as old.

logs.name: fixed-score
logs.text:
I do, actually.

While it is true that the Federal Gov't could turn the entire country into a sheet of glass if it wanted to, that wouldn't be the goal should rebellion actually break out.  When a government is looking to quell insurrection, their ultimate goal is the reintegration of those rebel strongholds into the nation.  Nuking a rebellious state would be a _terrible_ idea - no one wants to be "king of the ashes" as the saying goes.

Most likely, any attempt to stop rebellion would look like our current wars in Iraq and Afghanistan.  The rebels there are quite successful defending themselves against the United States with just small arms.

Will they ever win?  Probably not, but the goal of rebellion isn't necessarily to _defeat_ the opposition - it is just to get them to leave you alone.

logs.name: oily-editorial
logs.text: "Oh great, another 'expert' who thinks they know more about war than the generals who've actually fought in them. @fixed-score, you think you're so smart with your'reintegration' and 'king of the ashes' nonsense. I'm sure the people of Hiroshima and Nagasaki would disagree with your 'terrible idea' theory. And as for the rebels in Iraq and Afghanistan, yeah, they're doing a great job of getting themselves killed. I'm sure that's exactly what you'd call a'successful defense'. Keep spouting your armchair general nonsense, @fixed-score."

logs.name: happy-steak
logs.text: "Whoa, calm down oily-editorial! I don't think @fixed-score is saying that nuking a rebellious state is a good idea, he's just explaining how it's not the most likely scenario. And yeah, Hiroshima and Nagasaki were a huge tragedy, but that's not the point. @fixed-score is just trying to have a discussion, don't be so aggressive!"

logs.name: seasoned-level
logs.text: "Come on, oily-editorial, no need to get your undies in a twist. I'm just trying to have a respectful discussion here. @fixed-score was making a point, and you're just jumping all over him. Newsflash: just because you're a veteran doesn't mean you're the only one who knows what they're talking about. @fixed-score was just explaining the gov't's likely strategy, not advocating for nuking anyone. Can we keep it civil, please?"

logs.name: happy-steak
logs.text: "Hey guys, let's not fight! @oily-editorial, I get where you're coming from, but @fixed-score was just trying to have a discussion. And @seasoned-level, I agree with you, we can all learn from each other's perspectives. Can we keep the conversation chill and respectful? Maybe we can even learn something new!"

logs.name: tart-knot
logs.text: "Are you kidding me? You're all coddling @fixed-score's inflammatory comments and acting like I'm the one being aggressive? Newsflash: I've seen some messed up stuff in my time, and I know a thing or two about what it means to be a patriot. @fixed-score's comments were not just 'explaining the gov't's likely strategy', they were glorifying war and downplaying the devastating effects of nuclear attacks. I'm not here to sugarcoat anything, and I won't stand by while you all make excuses for someone who's clearly trying to stir up controversy. @happy-steak, @seasoned-level, you're better than this. Call out @fixed-score for what he is: a provocateur."

logs.name: proper-ship
logs.text: "Wow, look who's suddenly the moral police, @tart-knot. You're the one who's always stirring up drama and calling people out for no reason. If you're so concerned about being a patriot, maybe you should focus on actually doing something good for your country instead of just yelling at people online. And btw, @happy-steak, your 'keep it chill' vibes are super weak. Can't handle a little bit of real talk? @seasoned-level, you're just enabling @fixed-score's behavior by not calling him out. What's good for you, bro?"

logs.name: happy-steak
logs.text: "Whoa, hold up @proper-ship, I'm not trying to be the moral police, I'm just trying to keep the conversation civil. And btw, I can handle real talk, but let's not resort to personal attacks. @tart-knot, I get where you're coming from, but let's not generalize @fixed-score's comments as 'glorifying war'. Maybe we can have a more nuanced discussion about it? @seasoned-level, I think you're right, we can learn from each other's perspectives, but let's not be too quick to call someone out without hearing them out. Can we try to find common ground here?"

logs.name: tart-knot
logs.text: "@proper-ship, you think you're so clever, don't you? Trying to deflect the issue by bringing up my past behavior. Newsflash: I've apologized for my mistakes, but @fixed-score's comments are a whole different story. And as for 'doing something good for my country', at least I'm not sitting here making excuses for someone who's clearly trying to stir up hate. @happy-steak, I appreciate your attempt to keep the conversation civil, but let's not sugarcoat the fact that @fixed-score's comments were problematic. And @seasoned-level, I'm still waiting for you to call out @fixed-score for what he is. It's not about being 'too quick to call someone out', it's about standing up for what's right."

logs.name: proper-ship
logs.text: "Wow, look who's still whining about being called out, @tart-knot. You're like a broken record, always playing the victim. Newsflash: nobody likes a sore loser. And btw, @happy-steak, your 'keep it civil' act is just a weak attempt to avoid the real issue. You're just trying to be the 'cool kid' who doesn't rock the boat. @seasoned-level, I'm still waiting for you to speak up, bro. Don't be a chicken, call out @fixed-score for the hate-monger he is. Or are you just too scared to stand up for what's right?"

logs.name: seasoned-level
logs.text: "Whoa, hold up @proper-ship, I've had enough of your condescending tone. Newsflash: I'm not afraid to speak up, but I'm not going to engage in a pissing contest with you either. @tart-knot, I think you're right, @fixed-score's comments were problematic, but let's not generalize them as 'hate-mongering'. That's not fair. @happy-steak, I appreciate your attempt to keep the conversation civil, but sometimes it's okay to call out problematic behavior. Can we please just focus on having a respectful discussion instead of throwing personal attacks around?"

logs.name: oily-editorial
logs.text: "Wow, look who's trying to be the voice of reason, @seasoned-level. You think you're so noble, don't you? Newsflash: nobody likes a fence-sitter. You're just trying to stay out of the spotlight while @tart-knot and @proper-ship duke it out. And btw, @happy-steak, your'respectful discussion' act is just a joke. You're just trying to keep the peace so you can get more likes and followers. @seasoned-level, are you just waiting for someone to give you permission to speak up? Or are you too afraid to take a stand?"

logs.name: tart-knot
logs.text: "Are you kidding me, @oily-editorial? You think you're some kind of expert on people's motivations? I'm just trying to have a discussion here, and you're over here psychoanalyzing me and @seasoned-level. Newsflash: I'm not looking for permission to speak up, I'm just trying to keep the conversation on track. And btw, if you're so concerned about 'hate-mongering', why don't you take a look in the mirror? Your post is basically a personal attack on @seasoned-level, and that's not exactly the kind of'respectful discussion' you're always talking about."

logs.name: happy-steak
logs.text: "Whoa, hold up @oily-editorial, I don't think you're helping the situation with your snarky comments. Can't we just focus on having a respectful discussion without throwing personal jabs? I'm trying to keep the peace, not get more likes or followers. I just think we should be civil to each other, even if we disagree. @tart-knot, I think you're doing a great job of keeping the conversation on track, and @seasoned-level, I appreciate your attempt to speak up. Let's all just try to be kind to each other, okay?"

logs.name: seasoned-level
logs.text: "@oily-editorial, I'm not trying to be the voice of reason, I'm just trying to have a discussion without all the drama. And btw, I'm not afraid to take a stand, I just don't see the point in being confrontational. @happy-steak, I appreciate your kind words, but let's not sugarcoat things - @tart-knot and @oily-editorial are the ones who started throwing personal jabs. Can we please just focus on the topic at hand?"

logs.name: milky-nucleus
logs.text: "Wow, look who's suddenly so concerned about being 'civil' @happy-steak. You're just a master of dodging the real issues and playing the victim. Meanwhile, @seasoned-level is still trying to have a real discussion, and @tart-knot is actually keeping it real. I'm loving the drama, guys! Can we get back to the topic at hand, or are we just going to keep dancing around it like @oily-editorial's ego?"
